ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "project_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project type */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "budget" REAL /* Total budget for the project */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., active, inactive, completed) */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the project */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the project was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the project */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the project was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_project_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_type_id") REFERENCES project_types ("project_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_types" (
  "project_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project type */,
  "project_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the project type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project type */,
  "image" TEXT /* Image representing the project type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tasks" (
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the task belongs to */,
  "task_name" TEXT /* Name of the task */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the task */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the task */,
  "dependency" INTEGER /* Dependency of the task (e.g., predecessor task ID) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the task (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the task (e.g., active, inactive, completed) */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the task */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the task was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the task */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the task was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task the resource is allocated to */,
  "resource_name" TEXT /* Name of the resource (e.g., labor, material, equipment) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the resource allocated */,
  "unit_cost" REAL /* Unit cost of the resource */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the resource */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier */,
  "delivery_date" TEXT /* Date the resource will be delivered */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who allocated the resource */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the resource was allocated */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the resource */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the resource was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resources_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resources_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "costs" (
  "cost_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cost */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task the cost is associated with */,
  "cost_type" TEXT /* Type of cost (e.g., labor, material, equipment) */,
  "cost_amount" REAL /* Amount of the cost */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the cost was incurred */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who recorded the cost */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the cost was recorded */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the cost */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the cost was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cost_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_costs_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "materials" (
  "material_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each material */,
  "material_name" TEXT /* Name of the material */,
  "unit_cost" REAL /* Unit cost of the material */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the material */,
  "image" TEXT /* Image of the material */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment" (
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each equipment */,
  "equipment_name" TEXT /* Name of the equipment */,
  "unit_cost" REAL /* Unit cost of the equipment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the equipment */,
  "image" TEXT /* Image of the equipment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "labor" (
  "labor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each labor resource */,
  "labor_name" TEXT /* Name of the labor resource */,
  "unit_cost" REAL /* Unit cost of the labor resource */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the labor resource */,
  "image" TEXT /* Image of the labor resource */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("labor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather data record */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the weather data belongs to */,
  "weather_date" TEXT /* Date of the weather data */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature on that date */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Precipitation on that date */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity on that date */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed on that date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "material_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* ID of the material the price belongs to */,
  "price_date" TEXT /* Date of the price */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the material on that date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_material_prices_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment_rental_prices" (
  "rental_price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rental price record */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment the rental price belongs to */,
  "rental_date" TEXT /* Date of the rental price */,
  "price" REAL /* Rental price of the equipment on that date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rental_price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_equipment_rental_prices_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "labor_rates" (
  "labor_rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each labor rate record */,
  "labor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the labor resource the rate belongs to */,
  "rate_date" TEXT /* Date of the labor rate */,
  "rate" REAL /* Rate of the labor resource on that date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("labor_rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_labor_rates_labor_id FOREIGN KEY ("labor_id") REFERENCES labor ("labor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_stakeholders" (
  "stakeholder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stakeholder */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the stakeholder belongs to */,
  "stakeholder_name" TEXT /* Name of the stakeholder */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the stakeholder (e.g., client, contractor, supplier) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the stakeholder */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the stakeholder */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stakeholder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_stakeholders_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the update belongs to */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date of the update */,
  "update" TEXT /* Update or progress report */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the update */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the update was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the update */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the update was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_updates_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the supplier */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the payment belongs to */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier or contractor */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "payment_amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., bank transfer, check) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "invoices" (
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each invoice */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the invoice belongs to */,
  "invoice_date" TEXT /* Date the invoice was sent */,
  "invoice_amount" REAL /* Amount of the invoice */,
  "payment_terms" TEXT /* Payment terms (e.g., net 30, net 60) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("invoice_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoices_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)
